action.reasoning: Observation: Best so far is 0.7584 (simple DKT). Hybrid attention got 0.7582 test despite 0.7608 val. Analysis: small dataset, easy to overfit. Try ensemble or better regularization. Let me try a stronger DKT variant with skill-specific output (predict over all skills, gather next skill) which is the original DKT formulation. Decision: implement classic DKT predicting over all skills with gather, train with more dropout and longer.
